summary: Read-only plan for five hydrated open candidates. #84674 remains the live canonical for the Telegram isolated spool stale .processing claim family. #84158 is related but distinct. #84690 is quarantined because the job explicitly marks it as the security-signal ref. #90945 and #90989 form a separate channel_ingress_events stale-claim subcluster, with #90989 the candidate fix path for #90945 but no merge or close planned in this plan-only job.
